input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.2.3
            TITLE: when the ams, imd or bspd open the shutdown circuit:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.2.3: When the AMS, IMD or BSPD Open the Shutdown Circuit:
EV.7.2.3 When the AMS, IMD or BSPD Open the Shutdown Circuit: 
a. The Tractive System must stay disabled until manually reset  
b. The Tractive System must be reset only by manual action of a person directly at the 
vehicle  
c. The driver must not be able to reactivate the Tractive System from inside the vehicle  
d. Operation of the Shutdown Buttons or TSMS must not reset the Shutdown Circuit

final_answer: rule EV.7.2.3: When the AMS, IMD or BSPD Open the Shutdown Circuit: EV.7.2.3 When the AMS, IMD or BSPD Open the Shutdown Circuit: a. The Tractive System must stay disabled until manually reset b. The Tractive System must be reset only by manual action of a person directly at the vehicle c. The driver must not be able to reactivate the Tractive System from inside the vehicle d. Operation of the Shutdown Buttons or TSMS must not reset the Shutdown Circuit
